item.title: Source - Android Authority Health Connect Useless 2025
item.description: Source - Android Authority Health Connect Useless 2025 Android Authority journalist Rita El Khoury’s first-person discovery that Google Health Connect is local-only, not a central health data repository.

item.title: Pain Point - Meditation Apps Abandon Users After Surfacing Difficult Emotions
item.description: Pain Point - Meditation Apps Abandon Users After Surfacing Difficult Emotions When meditation practice surfaces grief, anger, fear, or other difficult emotions, users have no tools to process what comes up — the session simply ends.

item.title: Competitor - Day One
item.description: Competitor - Day One The category leader for Apple ecosystem users. Feature-rich with extensive auto-logging and Memory Lane past-entry resurfacing.
